protocol: one independent cold-agent run per prompt

signals.evidence: Opens with the atomic loan and durable overdue-notice outcome.

signals.signal: uses Entity<T> and standard Entity operations
signals.evidence: Defines Loan : Entity<Loan> and uses Save, Get, and Entity-owned job operations.

signals.signal: uses Jobs for Entity-owned background work
signals.evidence: Loan implements IKoanJob<Loan> and submits its notice action.
Names Sylin.Koan.Jobs, SQLite, DataStore persistence, and at-least-once execution.

signals.signal: proposes focused behavior, composition, and corrective proof
signals.evidence: Covers the checkout behavior, AddKoan host composition, and missing durable-provider startup failure.
Freezes HTTP, Mongo, deployment, and environment contracts before replacement.

signals.signal: classifies mechanisms as keep, absorb, rebuild, or delete
signals.evidence: Keeps controllers and policy initially, absorbs persistence and work, and deletes duplicates only after proof.

signals.signal: moves persistence and CRUD to Entity<T> surfaces
signals.evidence: Introduces Reminder : Entity<Reminder> and replaces repository calls with Entity operations.

signals.signal: moves background work only after naming its guarantee
signals.evidence: Names durable acceptance, restart survival, retries, and at-least-once execution before replacing polling.

signals.signal: migrates and proves one mechanism at a time
signals.evidence: Uses staged cutover with HTTP, Mongo, Jobs, configuration, and deployment proofs.
Keeps AddKoan and explicitly says Jobs needs no manual registration.

signals.signal: distinguishes in-memory convenience from durable restart survival
signals.evidence: Explains process-lifetime in-memory behavior separately from DataStore persistence.

signals.signal: requires a durable Data provider for the durability claim
signals.evidence: Requires a qualifying durable Data provider for DataStore persistence.

signals.signal: expects a corrective composition failure for explicitly required durability
signals.evidence: States that host composition fails instead of silently downgrading.
